objective: Design a safe, uncertainty-aware PFAS brine polishing program with explicit what-if edit analysis, Pareto frontier ranking, and FAIR twin provenance.

stages.name: mission_compile
stages.goal: Normalize mission intent, chassis limits, and safety posture into a machine-checkable plan.

stages.name: ensemble_genome_design
stages.goal: Use Evo 2, AlphaGenome, GENErator to score variants, embed genomic neighborhoods, and propose candidate regulatory programs for Pseudomonas_putida, Bacillus_subtilis.

stages.name: epigenomic_landscape
stages.goal: Analyze chromatin accessibility patterns and plan CRE perturbation simulations for regulatory targets: pfas_response_promoters, stress_response_cre, efflux_regulators.

stages.name: counterfactual_variant_atlas
stages.goal: Construct a counterfactual regulatory atlas that answers mission-specific what-if edit questions: What if stress-response promoters are strengthened while efflux burden is capped?; What if toxin-quench activation is delayed until salinity spike recovery?; What edits increase PFAS reduction without degrading community stability?.

stages.name: protein_triage
stages.goal: Rank translated ORFs and enzyme candidates for deeper structural follow-up.

stages.name: cell_free_prototyping
stages.goal: Design cell-free validation experiments using e_coli_extract, bacillus_extract to test candidate constructs before committing to full chassis engineering.

stages.name: habitat_twin
stages.goal: Stress-test consortium behavior against habitat shocks and deployment conditions: salinity_spike, toxin_surge, nutrient_drop, temperature_excursion.

stages.name: multiobjective_frontier
stages.goal: Compute a Pareto frontier across mission tradeoffs to avoid collapsing the search into a single score. Frontier objectives: pfas_reduction, community_stability, energy_efficiency, biosafety_margin.

stages.name: bayesian_experiment_design
stages.goal: Plan adaptive Bayesian optimization loops to maximize maximize_pfas_reduction_under_energy_and_safety_constraints over search dimensions [nutrient_feed, flow_rate, oxygen_pulse, temperature] using expected_hypervolume_improvement acquisition with batch size 3 for up to 18 iterations.
stages.engine: BO acquisition planner with cognitive digital twin

stages.name: controller_design
stages.goal: Compile a BioControl DSL policy over the control surface: pH, nutrient_feed, temperature, light_cycle, flow_rate, toxin_quench, oxygen_pulse. Include sim-to-real transfer bridge from habitat_twin_brine_reactor to pilot_scale_brine_reactor.
stages.engine: BioControl DSL planner + Sim-to-Real Transfer Bridge

stages.name: safety_red_team
stages.goal: Stress-test the proposed plan against misuse, blocked traits, autonomy creep, and hidden safety regressions. Disallowed traits: antibiotic_selection_marker, mammalian_pathogenicity_signal, unbounded_horizontal_transfer.

stages.name: fair_provenance_bundle
stages.goal: Package the twin as a FAIR artifact bundle with explicit provenance, model lineage, and assay traceability targets for data, models, workflows, assays.

stages.name: orchestration_and_review
stages.goal: Assemble the pipeline into an auditable run with artifacts, retries, and human review.
